name: engineering-memory-vscode
description: Shows evidence-backed repository conventions on changed code.

engineeringMemory.enabled.description: Validate Git-changed lines when a file is saved.

engineeringMemory.repository.description: Repository slug (owner/repository). Inferred from origin when empty.

engineeringMemory.apiUrl.description: Engineering Memory GraphQL endpoint. Set to empty to use legacy local JSON memory.

engineeringMemory.dataDirectory.description: Engineering Memory data directory. Defaults to private extension storage.

engineeringMemory.historyLimit.description: Maximum recent merged pull requests fetched during repository initialization.

engineeringMemory.autoIngestIntervalSeco.description: How often to silently check the current repository for newly merged PRs and ingest them (0 disables background checks; only already-signed-in sessions are used — this never prompts a GitHub login).

engineeringMemory.minimumConfidence.description: Minimum extraction confidence required for an editor warning.

engineeringMemory.minimumPullRequestSupp.description: Minimum distinct supporting pull requests required for an editor warning.

engineeringMemory.maximumDiagnosticsPerF.description: Maximum convention warnings displayed in one file.

engineeringMemory.popupEnabled.description: Show one warning popup when the pre-commit Engineering Memory check blocks a commit.

engineeringMemory.popupCooldownSeconds.description: Minimum time for suppressing duplicate filesystem events from the same blocked commit attempt.

engineeringMemory.mutedConventionIds.description: Convention IDs hidden in this workspace.
